column1: Hey Nikolai, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Cool yea I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Punta canna or just the cheapest one
yeaa thats where ill be too
how many ppl in your group?
thats solid! you all from the same school?
gass fire campus y'all gotta be havin a good time over there lol
I'll send over a breakdown of how booking works and pricing right now. Were yall lookin to start getting things secured today?
Ok thanks and we are just looking for estimates at the moment
yea all good I got you , ill send what we have mind just keep in mind things change daily and availability is low this time of year
Is it cool if I send through email? its a little long for text
Yes do you have my email
which one should I send to?
sent that over lmk if you got it!
Do you have rates for checkin on the 14th?
yup we can do that, it all looks the same. pricing is the same
did we want to get started for the 14th instead?
We are looking into which flights are cheaper
whats good how'd things go looking at flights
sup Nikolai spring break still a go?
We found flights that work for us
okay dope. what dates are your flights
Same dates as the ones we were discussing
Would the rates be per person or per room with the people
Per person. We lookin at Cancun right?
word we only have a couple rooms left for the 14-19 so we'd have to move quickly
Ok, do you guys sell tickets for the dj events
we have a party pass that comes with round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at the top nightclubs in Punta like Imagine Cava and Coco bongo
pricing ranges from 70ish to 300 depending on how many nights you want to do. and we also have our open bar booze cruise which is pretty dope
Ok because we have a friend who will be able to book our rooms for us however we will still need a party pass.
got it, makes sense. where would you be booking? the party pass requires pickup from one of our ticket boxes at the resorts we host at
This would be at the carribe occidental
oh perfect yea we'll be able to get you squared away then
is your friend a travel agent?
His family is in the industry
dope yea take advantage of that
I'll send you the full pricing for the party passes. when did you want to lock those in?
Would be from the 15th to the 19th
word just emailed you details with pricing. let me know when we ready to lock it in
Do the party passes include matroda and omnon party's ?
I believe those are with a different company tbr
yoo what's up Nikolai it's Spiffy from Spring Break U. hope summer went smooth
y'all lookin to plan anything for spring break this school year?
word all good. I'll send some info for it so you have it on hand
you know which week your spring break is?
yo Nikolai whats good bro, how's things lookin for spring break?
We are looking to stay in the Bahamas if you have any suggestions
yea I got you. Nassau and Freeport are both popular. email still the same? ill send it over
word, any shot you know which week your spring break is gonna be? I can look for it too
looks like the week of the 21st but lmk if im correct
just sent that through bro, had to grab a couple of the prices from ops team apologies on the delay
whats good Nikolai, you get to check out those spring break options?
sup brotha, hows the squad feelin about break?
So we are looking int other now as a much bigger group then originally anticipated
bet that, we can take care of y'all bro. how many-ish ppl we thinkin now?
easy. I'll be able to hook you up as the group leader with a group that size too
you'd actually qualify to get your trip reimbursed and stay for free at that group size lol
Can you explain the rates more in depth

for sure bro. so the pricing you see is per person in each room. the cheapest price is when you have a room occupancy of 4 ppl. all inclusive resorts dont allow more than 4 per room. the price you pay comes with your stay, airport transportation at the destination, all you can eat & drink alcohol included, our 24/7 support staff, all parties and events on the resort, and all taxes and fees
Do you have any idea what dis would be performing in puta Cana or Nassau
the exact list is tbd, but in punta in years past we've brought on Twinsick, Not AGN, Itsmurph, plus we bring out our own djs to host parties all week for you guys on and off the resort
whats up Nikolai did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
But we really like the rates you sent us for Nassau and I think we are looking to move on those.
all good bro and word yea Nassau is lit, when were you guys lookin to lock it in by?
Do you have a Black Friday deal ?
And also are they the same rates no matter how big the group ?
yea bro for black friday we are offering $50 off per person plus a booze cruise added to your account, for free
and i can see what i can cook up, how many ppl you got in the group so far?
yerr whats good bro, how many ppl you got in the group so far?
Nikolai whats good bro, how we lookin?
Still collecting numbers but we should have finalized mid December
We are very set on Nassau
bet bro lets run it, how many ppl we lookin at as of now?
Around 30-40, Are we able to hop on a call at some point this week
We want to understand the room splitting details more
yea def bro, when works best for you?
yea bro, what time works for you
I am free at 230 if that works for you
yea yup, you on eastern time right
bet, I'll give you a call then
great chattin bro, sending this new pricing over shortly
not sure if you wanna grab everyones emails, I can start a thread with everyone all together
also down for the group text if easier
whats good bro just wanted to make sure you got the new package rate I sent over
Let me look at that also I will start the email chain
Okay cool bro. Keep me posted
yerr whats good brotha, how things lookin on your end?
Nikolai my dogg, how we feelin about everything so far?
sup! you still lookin for help getting situated for spring break?
Yes sorry been swamped with work and finals. We have just created the big group chat for everyone where we want to send in the link to buy rooms and what not.
All good bro! How did finals go?
So our big group is currently at 116 in the group me but I think its going to be cut down to 70
Okay cool, yea some ppl may drop. We can hook it up either way
I'll get the reservation portal for the group started. Will add about 100 slots just to get us started and we'll adjust from there

I remember you mentioned some of the leaders of each chapter may have had some questions. I'm down to answer whatever they need. We can do a group zoom, the email thread, or group imessage on my personal
Yes for now I have the big groupme with all people thinking of committing and I think they will come to me with the groups they create and I will direct them to the sign up portal
Easy. you have a good set up
if need/want to add me to the groupme feel free. I'll make this for you right now
Ok great and yes let me know what link I can start sending for people to sign up I think we will start either this week or next but the wheels are turning
Sorry about the delay bro waiting for one thing from our operations team
Ok great thank you. Also our committee wanted to ask if you have references of groups of our size we could talk to or refer to before we go ahead and make this large of a booking.
Yea absolutely! we have a handful of groups your size

I may not be able to just give you their direct contacts to reach out though, it may be against data policy. I'll have to check in with the team in the morning on the best way to go about that if thats cool
The schools your size though we have University at Buffalo, Michigan State, Coastal Carolina, Umass Amherst off head that are all about your size group
I also emailed over the reservation portal too btw
Hey bro just wanted to make sure, will the 22nd to 26th be alright for you guys? ops team had to shift a day to get the full group accommodated cleanly

Also if youre around later on lets jump on a call to talk through how you can locate on of our other groups without me crossing boundaries of data policy. theres also a bunch from previous years. want to make sure the rest of the committee feels good and comfortable with everything
I'm seing the portal now as well and we have groups ready to sign up
Okay cool. Yup it's all set up and ready
Did you want to hop on a call now? Or did the full comittee want to hop on too
Can we start booking on the portal now
You have the link? I'll text it too
Is it still a two person room if two people sign up and it's a 4 slot thing
Because some wanna do 2 and some wanna do 4
Yea so those ppl can slide into any of the open 4 person rooms, and then we'll delete the other two slots
The price is gonna be diff tho for the 2 person rooms, just wanna make sure they know
morning brotha. yea let me adjust some things to make that work
all good for 11:30ish. chat then my man
Hey bro I'll be about 10 mins behind if that's okay
No problem just give me a ring
sup bro! whenever you got a min, if you could have everyone put in their flight info, so we can set up your airport transfers
Sounds good. What is going on with my contract?

teams reviewing everything now that we have the group all locked in. should have more details tomorrow on commission. your free stay's been put through, and everyone has the discount we started off with
